Content:
# BadtzUI - Modern UI Library for Frontend Developers 🛠️✨

![GitHub Repo stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/badtzx0/badtz-ui?style=social)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-blue.svg)

A sleek and modern **React UI library** built for frontend developers who want to ship beautiful interfaces faster. ⚡

---

## 🚀 Features

- 💅 **Pre-built Components** — Ready-to-use UI elements for rapid development.
- 🎨 **Customizable Themes** — Easily tweak styles to match your brand.
- ⚡ **Optimized for Performance** — Lightweight and blazing fast.
- 📦 **Fully Typed** — Written in TypeScript for type safety.

---

## 📖 Documentation

Check out the full documentation here 👉 [BadtzUI Docs](https://badtz-ui.com/docs)

---

## 🤝 Contributing

We welcome contributions! 🎉

1. Fork the repo  
2. Create your branch: `git checkout -b feature/your-feature`  
3. Commit your changes: `git commit -m "feat: add new feature"`  
4. Push to the branch: `git push origin feature/your-feature`  
5. Open a Pull Request  

For more details, check out our [Contributing Guide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/badtzx0/badtz-ui/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).

---

## 💬 Community
Translation:
# BadtzUI - 面向前端开发者的现代 UI 库 🛠️✨

![GitHub Repo stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/badtzx0/badtz-ui?style=social)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-blue.svg)

一个时尚且现代的 **React UI 库**，专为希望更快交付漂亮界面的前端开发者打造。⚡

---

## 🚀 特性

- 💅 **预构建组件** — 即用型 UI 元素，助力快速开发。
- 🎨 **可定制主题** — 轻松调整样式以匹配您的品牌。
- ⚡ **性能优化** — 轻量且极速。
- 📦 **全面类型支持** — 采用 TypeScript 编写，保证类型安全。

---

## 📖 文档

查看完整文档 👉 [BadtzUI 文档](https://badtz-ui.com/docs)

---

## 🤝 贡献

欢迎贡献！🎉

1. Fork 仓库  
2. 创建分支：`git checkout -b feature/your-feature`  
3. 提交更改：`git commit -m "feat: add new feature"`  
4. 推送分支：`git push origin feature/your-feature`  
5. 发起 Pull Request  

更多详情，请查看我们的[贡献指南](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/badtzx0/badtz-ui/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)。

---

## 💬 社区

BadtzUI 在 [MIT 许可证](LICENSE) 下授权，附加条款限制未经修改或仅做少量修改的版本转售。
